Related Entities

  • hospital THE MEDICAL CENTER (BOWLING GREEN) 2-star overall rating
  • hospital TRISTAR GREENVIEW REGIONAL HOSPITAL 2-star overall rating
  • hospital RIVENDELL BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES
  • snf Colonial Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 2-star, 48 beds
  • snf Signature Healthcare of Bowling Green 4-star, 176 beds
  • snf Hopkins Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 5-star, 50 beds
  • snf Greenwood Rehabilitation and Healthcare Center 2-star, 128 beds
  • snf Bowling Green Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 3-star, 66 beds
  • snf Christian Health Center 4-star, 45 beds
  • snf Magnolia Village Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 4-star, 60 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
